results.summary: Ran 9 session-tier audits; found 0 error(s), 1 warning(s), 1 info signal(s).

findings.message: Component script is large (207 non-empty lines). This often indicates logic creep.
findings.suggestion: Move domain rules/orchestration into composables; keep only UI state and event wiring.

findings.message: Component defines many local functions (9). Consider extracting reusable/domain logic into composables.

findings.message: Composable export name does not match file name: useMountDragAndDropOnPanelsIfReady vs useDragAndDropInstance
findings.suggestion: Rename the file or export so `useX.ts` exports `useX` (reduces drift and improves discoverability).

recommendations: Review `.project-manager/patterns/vue-architecture-contract.md` and move domain logic out of components.
Review `.project-manager/patterns/composable-taxonomy.md` and standardize composable naming/return shapes.
